name: new-command
description: Create a new CLI command following project conventions
prompt:
Create a new CLI command in packages/polygon-agent-cli/src/commands/ following the existing pattern. The command should:
1. Export a yargs CommandModule with command, describe, builder, and handler
2. Follow the existing code style (TypeScript, strict types)
3. Include proper error handling
4. Be registered in src/index.ts

Ask the user for the command name and functionality before creating it.
